project: EURABAY Living System - Market Regime Detection
description: Market regime detection system to identify trending, ranging, volatile, and calm market conditions for adaptive strategy selection

userStories.title: Implement trend detection using moving averages
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to detect whether the market is trending or ranging to use appropriate strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate trend direction: UP if SMA_20 > SMA_50, DOWN if SMA_20 < SMA_50
Test trend detection on historical data

userStories.title: Implement volatility regime classification
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to classify market as low, medium, or high volatility to adjust strategy parameters.
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate average ATR over last 100 bars
Classify as NORMAL_VOL if ratio between 0.7 and 1.3
Test volatility classification on historical data

userStories.title: Implement market state classification
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to combine trend and volatility into a single market state for strategy selection.
acceptanceCriteria: Combine trend and volatility into 6 states:
- trending_calm: Trending + low volatility (ideal for trend following)
- trending_volatile: Trending + high volatility (use wider stops)
- ranging_calm: Ranging + low volatility (ideal for mean reversion)
- ranging_volatile: Ranging + high volatility (reduce position size)
- transitioning: State change detected (wait for confirmation)
Detect state transitions (require 3 consecutive bars in new state)
Test market state classification on historical data

userStories.title: Implement regime-specific strategy selection
userStories.description: As a system, I need to automatically select the best strategy based on current market regime.
acceptanceCriteria: Define strategy library: trend_following, mean_reversion, breakout, momentum
Implement select_strategy() method based on market state
Log strategy selections and regime changes
Test strategy selection on historical data

userStories.title: Implement regime change detection
userStories.description: As a system, I need to detect when market regime changes to update strategy selection.
acceptanceCriteria: Compare current regime with previous regime
Require confirmation (3 consecutive bars in new regime)
Store regime changes in database for analysis
Log regime changes with timestamp and details
Calculate regime duration (time in current regime)
Test regime change detection on historical data

userStories.title: Implement regime-specific risk parameters
userStories.description: As a risk manager, I need different risk parameters for different market regimes.
acceptanceCriteria: Define risk parameters for each regime type:

userStories.title: Implement regime performance tracking
userStories.description: As a system, I need to track performance of each regime to understand which conditions are most profitable.
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate win rate for each regime type
Calculate average P&L for each regime type
Calculate Sharpe ratio for each regime type
Count trades in each regime (sample size)
Identify best and worst performing regimes
Test regime performance tracking on historical data

userStories.title: Implement regime transition probability matrix
userStories.description: As a system, I need to understand regime transitions to predict future market conditions.
acceptanceCriteria: Track all regime transitions in database
Calculate average duration of each regime
Update matrix weekly with new data
Test transition matrix calculation on historical data

userStories.title: Implement multi-timeframe regime analysis
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to analyze regimes across multiple timeframes to confirm market state.
acceptanceCriteria: Analyze regime on M15, H1, H4 timeframes
Require agreement across 2+ timeframes for confidence
If H1 says trending but H4 says ranging → wait for confirmation
If all timeframes agree → high confidence regime
Use multi-timeframe agreement for signal filtering
Test multi-timeframe analysis on historical data

userStories.title: Implement regime filtering for signals
userStories.description: As a system, I need to filter trading signals based on current market regime to avoid low-probability trades.
acceptanceCriteria: Define allowed signal types for each regime:
- trending_calm: allow BUY/SELL signals from trend strategies
- ranging_calm: allow BUY/SELL from mean reversion strategies
- trending_volatile: only allow signals in trend direction
Test signal filtering on historical data

userStories.title: Implement regime API endpoints and streaming
userStories.description: As a frontend, I need API endpoints to fetch current regime and regime history.

functionalRequirements: FR-1: System must detect market regime (trending/ranging, low/high volatility)
FR-2: System must select strategy based on regime
FR-3: System must adjust risk parameters based on regime
FR-4: System must track regime performance
FR-5: System must filter signals based on regime
FR-6: System must provide regime visibility via API
nonGoals: No ML for regime prediction (keep it rule-based and simple)
No complex state space models (HMM, etc.)
No multi-asset regime analysis (focus on individual symbols)
technicalConsiderations: Regime changes require confirmation to avoid whipsaw
Regime tracking must be persistent (survive restarts)
Regime analysis must work on all 5 volatility indices
Regime filtering should reduce false signals by 30-40%
successMetrics: Regime detection accuracy > 80% (verified by visual inspection)
Regime-specific strategies outperform generic strategy by 20%+
Signal filtering reduces false signals by 30-40%
Regime transitions are detected within 5 bars
System adapts strategy within 1 bar of regime change
